intro.paragraph1: Full-Stack Developer working with a TypeScript · Next.js · Node.js · MongoDB stack. I combine a Computer Engineering background with real production development, currently building CostaSpanish Academy, an LMS SaaS platform deployed on Vercel with CI/CD through GitHub Actions.
intro.paragraph2: I have hands-on experience building complete web applications, from REST API design to authentication, internationalization, and file management with Firebase. I focus on building clear, scalable, and well-structured products with both technical judgment and product mindset.
intro.paragraph3: I am looking to join a team where I can contribute from day one, keep growing as an engineer, and help build real products that deliver value.

item2.meta: Current - Alfonso X el Sabio University

experience.title: Work Experience
experience.subtitle: Real experience through internship and production projects.

points: Developed custom web solutions with WordPress and improved Laravel-based architectures.
Worked in an agile environment managing tickets, prioritizing tasks, and tracking deliveries under Scrum methodology.
Implemented interfaces from Figma designs, improving user experience, performance, and interactivity.

points.title: SaaS platform for a language academy.
points.description: Centralized educational management system with business logic for students, plans, credits, lessons, and pedagogical history.

points.title: Stack and deployment.
points.description: Next.js, TypeScript, MongoDB, Firebase Storage, NextAuth, and next-intl. Deployed on Vercel with CI/CD, E2E testing, and external service integrations.
